prompt: In the context of structure-based drug design, engineer a selective protein binder targeting 16 kDa heat shock protein (HspX / alpha-crystallin, Rv2626c) (bacterial small heat shock protein) expressed by Mycobacterium tuberculosis. The binder should achieve picomolar binding. describe a strategy for: (1) initial binder scaffold selection using ColabFold, (2) interface design and optimization, (3) specificity profiling. Include relevant computational tools and databases to use.
